_doc: Curated scope-alias lexicon (same merge-at-load pattern as aliases.json, but for SCOPE not markets). Three tables, all keys/values matched after fold(): competitions (acronym/short-form -> a competition NAME the lexical grounder then resolves to a group id), regions (a place adjective/short-form -> a country/branch NAME for the region hard-scope), markers (a surface marker -> a normalized token the grounder maps to an ntVariant / women's-competition variant). Bridges only — add a key only when vectors/lexical fundamentally can't reach it (lexically disjoint), never to patch a tuning miss.
